channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Another Lakers legend to receive statue outside arena
item.description: One of the winningest coaches in NBA history will forever be enshrined in downtown Los Angeles when the Lakers unveil the newest statue on Star Plaza outside Crypto.com Arena.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Rory McIlroy brought to tears talking about rough year, including almost divorcing wife, after latest win
item.description: Rory McIlroy has had some big wins, but he was brought to tears after winning his latest trophy as he reflected on a year of adversity, including almost getting divorced.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kansas remains No. 1 in AP poll, top 10 shuffled with losses by 3 teams; Wisconsin joins rankings
item.description: Kansas strengthened its grip on No. 1 in the AP Top 25. The rest of the top 10 turned into a jumble of teams swapping places. The Jayhawks picked up five first-place votes in The Associated Press men's college basketball poll released on Monday, receiving 49 from a 61-person media panel. No.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mike Tyson-Jake Paul fight draws record betting for a combat sports event
item.description: Jake Paul’s unanimous victory over former heavyweight champion Mike Tyson might have been disappointing from a competitive standpoint, but it drew record betting.
item.dc:creator: Mark Anderson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump thinks he can fix golf's mess. He starts by playing golf with PGA Tour commissioner
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump boasted during the campaign he would need about 15 minutes to get a deal done between the PGA Tour and the Saudi investors of LIV Golf. That started with four hours on the golf course with PGA Tour Commissioner Jay Monahan.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LPGA Tour star Charley Hull appears to break out Trump's dance move during tournament
item.description: English LPGA Tour star Charley Hull appeared to join the line of professional athletes who pulled off President-elect Donald Trump's dance move over the weekend.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: James Harden breaks tie with Ray Allen, moves to No. 2 on NBA's career 3-point list
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — James Harden now stands alone at No. 2 in 3-pointers. The Los Angeles Clippers guard connected on the 2,974th 3-pointer of his career Sunday night and broke a tie with Basketball Hall of Famer Ray Allen for the No. 2 spot on the NBA’s list.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Packers block game-winning field goal to beat Bears, pick up 11th straight victory over rival
item.description: The Green Bay Packers blocked a game-winning field goal attempt by the Chicago Bears to defeat their NFC North rival, 20-19, in a thrilling battle at Soldier Field.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Thousands of Netflix users report outages during Tyson-Paul boxing match
item.description: Just as thousands of Netflix users flocked to the app to stream Friday night's head-to-head boxing match between champion Mike Tyson and YouTuber-turned-boxer Jake Paul, the stream crashed.
item.dc:creator: Russell Falcon, WGN 9

item.title: Nuggets star Nikola Jokic and coach Michael Malone miss game against Pelicans for personal reasons
item.description: The Denver Nuggets were without star center Nikola Jokic and coach Michael Malone for their NBA Cup opener Friday night against the New Orleans Pelicans.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: The world's tallest teenager, 7-foot-9 Olivier Rioux, plans to redshirt at Florida this season
item.description: GAINESVILLE, Fla. (AP) — The world’s tallest teenager might have to wait a year to become the world’s tallest college basketball player. Florida coach Todd Golden says Olivier Rioux, a 7-foot-9 freshman who owns a spot in the Guinness record book, is planning to redshirt.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Jazz beat Dallas for first home victory, 115-113
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was finally home sweet home for the Utah Jazz. John Collins scored the last of his 28 points on a tiebreaking dunk with 6.4 seconds left to give the Utah Jazz their first home victory of the season, 115-113 over the Dallas Mavericks on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Yankees name Dave Sims new radio play-by-play voice
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- The New York Yankees have officially named a new play-by-play voice. Veteran broadcaster Dave Sims will replace John Sterling, who says he’s officially retired for good after a brief return to call playoff games.
item.dc:creator: Kate Rooney, PIX 11

item.title: Bucs bring back Super Bowl winning safety Mike Edwards
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers have bolstered their ailing secondary by claiming Mike Edwards off of waivers from the Tennessee Titans, the team announced Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Utes mired in longest losing streak in 11 years
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It has been one of the most disappointing seasons in Utah football history, and head coach Kyle Whittingham is feeling the pain. "It's been one of the most frustrating seasons of my career," Whittingham said on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
